## Task Summary

Describe the small improvement.

## Area

Select the area:

- [ ] README clarity
- [ ] VERIFY instructions
- [ ] Release note clarity
- [ ] Website text
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Typo or grammar fix
- [ ] Image alt text
- [ ] Other public documentation

## Expected Change

Describe the exact public-facing improvement.

## Why This Is Beginner-Friendly

Explain why this task is small and safe.

## Scope Confirmation

- [ ] This task does not require proprietary HDEX Q1 runtime source code.
- [ ] This task is limited to public documentation, public repository metadata, or public release clarity.
